message:
feat(io): add typed integer read methods to AsyncReadExt trait

Expands AsyncReadExt with 22 new read methods for all standard integer
and float types in both big-endian and little-endian byte orders:
read_u16, read_u16_le, read_i16, read_i16_le, read_u32, read_u32_le,
read_i32, read_i32_le, read_u64, read_u64_le, read_i64, read_i64_le,
read_u128, read_u128_le, read_i128, read_i128_le, read_f32,
read_f32_le, read_f64, read_f64_le.

Implementation uses a read_int_trait_method! macro that generates both
the trait method (returning a future with an internal fixed-size buffer)
and the corresponding Future impl that fills the buffer via poll_read
and converts the bytes to the target type. Each method is documented
with its byte order.

Also refines read_u8/read_i8 doc comments for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
